The '''''Ravelev''''' was a [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighter]] captained by [[Kassler]], that plied the [[Anarid Cluster]].

Among its crew was [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] who served as a technician for two years. She left the crew on [[Boztrok]] in order to join the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]], and earn enough to buy her own freighter. This was against Kassler's advice, but she nevertheless departed on good terms.<ref name="psg">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref>
